Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_KAGAMI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1117 0 0}I knew it! Now we should be able to get to the Shadow, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_KAGAMI2F_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Actually, the seal's still intact! But that should've...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_KAGAMI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't panic. Can you pick up any similar signals?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SANADA_KAGAMI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, there must be something we're missing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_KAGAMI2F_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}Got it! I'm getting a signal from a mirror on the third floor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_KAGAMI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then we just have to break that one too, right? Fuuka, can you tell which room it's in?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_KAGAMI2F_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Sorry, I can't pinpoint the exact location. There's too much interference from the main signal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_KAGAMI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess we'll just have to go and find another mirror that doesn't show our reflection.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_KAGAMI2F_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It should be inside one of the rooms on the third floor! Good luck![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_KAGAMIHIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5088 0 0}I'm not getting a signal from that mirror anymore. It looks like that did it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_TOPPA_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5088 0 0}The main signal is completely gone! The seal should be broken now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_TOPPA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Excellent! Then the target's room should be accessible now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Still, we're behind schedule. Let's move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SANADA_TOPPA_G
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}It's about time. Now we can finally meet the enemy face-to-face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's be sure to repay the favor for all the trouble it's put us through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DNG_MIRROR_BREAK_YUK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come on! Let's get this over with![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DNG_MIRROR_BREAK_JUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Damn... Yuka-tan's lookin' pretty fired up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DNG_MIRROR_BREAK_SAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I say she's got the right idea. My fists are aching for some action, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DNG_MIRROR_BREAK_MIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I get how you feel, but keep it together. We can't afford to lose focus against an enemy like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_KAGAMI_NOMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This mirror is pretty large...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Hm... A mirror this big would be convenient, but I'm not so sure about this design...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_IIDESUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I sense a large presence behind that door![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_KOWASANA_AKAND
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}There's a powerful seal on that door![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}You'll have to break the seal before you can fight the Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}We'll be in big trouble if the Dark Hour ends before you defeat it. Please hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Why can't this just be over already? I wanna go home and take a shower...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}No dice, huh? Dammit, where could it be...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4121 0 0}It doesn't seem like it's in there... Let's keep looking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT21
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1142 0 0}It's completely see-through... Why would they design it like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT22
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}It's kinda creepy that it's see-through, but I guess that's easier for us... Looks like nothing's there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT23
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}Hm, I'm not seeing anything... We'll just have to turn every stone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT31
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Sheesh, even the bathroom door's way over the top. I bet it's the same inside too, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT32
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Think it could be inside? There aren't really any places it could hide in there, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT41
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Everything in this room is so fancy. Even the TV looks like it's top of the line.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT42
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2073 0 0}What if there was a Shadow in the TV!? Yeah, right, like that would ever happen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT51
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1143 0 0}It's all such bad taste... Seriously, who'd want to sleep in place like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT52
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}Not here, huh? I'd like to put an end to this already...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT61
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}They really committed to this theme, didn't they? Getting a little repetitive, don'tcha think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT62
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Nothing... We'll just have to keep checking everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT72
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}If it was actually in here the whole time, we'd have one ice-cold Shadow-sicle on our hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT73
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}Nothing here... Where else haven't we looked?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HIERO_HIT8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Hierophant's Chamber HIT 8: Backup[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_KAGAMI_SIRABER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I do with this mirror...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_KAGAMI_MATIGAI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My mind is starting to feel fuzzy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_KAGAMI_HAKAIZU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like I already broke this mirror.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_KAGAMI_HAKAIZU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This mirror is broken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_BOSS_ALL_IRU2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}The Shadow is waiting behind this door![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_HOUOU_DOOR_HAZ
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door won't budge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A strong force seems to be holding it shut.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HOUOU_FUKA_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I still sense a Shadow in that room![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It's different from the one you just defeated![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}But where is it? Is it hiding...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HOUOU_FUKA_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I still sense a Shadow in that room![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It must be hiding... Try to see if you can find it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_KAGAMI_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}Hey... Is it just me, or is there something weird about this mirror?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_BOSSROOM_OBJECT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nothing about this seems[n]terribly out of the ordinary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_HOUOUNOMA_TOIR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like a bathroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_HOUOUNOMA_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's quite a large bed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_GARASU_MAE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can see the bathroom through the window.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_GARASU_ATO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1091 0 0}Hey! What are you staring at that for?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_MAE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scent of soap is still[n]lingering from the bathroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_ATO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}What're you— There's no reason for us to be here! Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_PTAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari doesn't look very happy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_REPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is giving me an icy glare...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_ATO1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Ugh... It's getting to the point where just being back here is giving me a headache...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_AORI_JYUNPEI1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}"Back here"? Oooh... Did something... steamy happen while we were separated?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_ATO2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}...You know, I pretty much already knew, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Your mind just lives in the gutter, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_AORI_SANADA1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3103 0 0}Hm? This bathroom seems recently used... But in the Dark Hour...? Who—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_ATO3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't matter! What's it to you, anyway?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SYAWASITU_ATO4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* Nothing. Let's just go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_HEYA_HURO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like a bathroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_HEYA_TV
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The TV doesn't seem to be working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}The signal's coming from the large room on the third floor. Let's beat it before someone gets hurt![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_Y
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}What are you doing? We're not even on the right floor! C'mon, we need to deal with the Shadow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_J
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}Hey, I wouldn't get sidetracked unless you want an earful from Yuka-tan...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_S
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}The signal's coming from the third floor, isn't it? We should go deal with the Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_M
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}There's no time to relax. It's crucial that we eliminate the target with all due haste.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3F_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I don't think that's the right room... It should be more spacious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3F_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}That's not it... The signal's coming from a different room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3F_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5037 0 0}No, it's not that one... Are there any larger rooms?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3FY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, I think I saw a big door earlier... Should we maybe check it out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3FJ
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Didn't we pass by a fishy-lookin' place before? Maybe that's it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3FS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are only so many rooms. We'll find it eventually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA_3FM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're looking for an especially large room, right? It may look different from the other rooms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HAIRUNA2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The seal has been broken![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Please head for the Shadow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ELEVATOR_TUKAE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the elevator isn't working...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ELEVATOR_YUKAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}It's not working. We'll just have to take the stairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ELEVATOR_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}It must be out of order because it's the Dark Hour. Please use the stairs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_HAJIKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I'm getting a reading from the large room on the third floor. Please go quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_HAJIKI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}The seal is surrounding the whole building. It looks like there's no way out right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_HAJIKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}In other words, we're not getting out until this Shadow goes down. Well, that's fine by me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_HAJIKI3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The seal has been broken, so please head for the target![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_1F_PANEL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like a list of available rooms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_PANEL_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}What's this? Are these room numbers?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_1F_UKETUKE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a coffin behind the reception desk...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_UKETUKE_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Oof, these rooms are pretty pricey. Good to know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_1F_ZIHANKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The vending machine doesn't[n]seem to be working...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ZIHANKI_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}They don't work during the Dark Hour. Let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ZIHANKI_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Holy crap, they upcharge for drinks!? Not that I'm buying, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ZIHANKI_MITSUR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4059 0 0}It's the Dark Hour. You won't be able to buy anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_1F_MATIAISITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a chair behind the curtain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_2F_HININ
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This might be a guest of the hotel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HININ_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1090 0 0}Wha—!? Hey, what're you looking at that for!? Anyways, moving on! Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HININ_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2127 0 0}So, uh... this pretty much proves what kinda hotel this is, right? It's not just my dirty mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HININ_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3104 0 0}"Family planning"...? What's this vending machine selling?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_2F_HARIGAMI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a poster on the wall here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_3F_HININ
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The vending machine doesn't[n]seem to be working...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_3F_HARIGAMI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a poster on the wall here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_101_MIRROR_YUK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}This one's just a normal mirror, right? Wasn't there something weird about the one before...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM101_ISU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This chair has a backrest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_ROOM101_ISU_Y
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}C'mon, this is no time to be putting your feet up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM201_SHOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM201_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM202_BEDHUT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM203_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM203_SOFA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM204_KARAOK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM205_BEDHUT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM301_SHOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM302_ISU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a heart-shaped chair.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM303_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a round bed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM303_OKE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM304_HITO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM305_SHOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ROOM305_SOFA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This guest has been transmogrified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_LOCKED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door is locked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_LOCKED_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something's blocking the door from opening.[n]Possibly a coffin inside the room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_LOCKED_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}I tried that door, but it wouldn't open. I guess it's locked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_LOCKED_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3067 0 0}Being in a locked room might actually be safer for anyone inside right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_LOCKED_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}I checked there myself a short while ago. It's locked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_FRIDGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a small fridge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_2FONLY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Please break the mirror on this floor first before moving on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_205BREAK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Hmm, looks like it's not reflecting everything... Do you want to try breaking it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_205BREAK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can't know for sure if this is the right one, but do you want to try breaking it and see?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_2FMR_BLOCK1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}This mirror looks pretty normal to me, but it's your call, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_2FMR_BROKEN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}If this one's a dud, let's try breaking the mirror in Room 205, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_CHECK_ANOTHER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}Hey, why don't we check the mirror in the room across the way?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_2FMR_BLOCK2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}The signal's coming from the third floor. Try searching the rooms there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_2FMR_BLOCK3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}There's no need to break any more mirrors. Go for the Shadow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}This thing takes up so much space... I guess it's no wonder, given its shape.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_JYUNPEI_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Oh, is this the type that spins? Uh, I'm just guessing; it's not like I know anything about that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SANADA_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm, this round shape... What purpose does it serve?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}It may appear lavish at first glance, but the actual craftsmanship leaves much to be desired.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_BEDR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It looks super gaudy to me. But I wonder, when it's actually spinning...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}...No, then it'd just be gaudy and tacky. Anyway, let's keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ITEMGET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_SOFA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}This person might catch a cold, sleeping here like this... But I guess we can't exactly move them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_JYUNPEI_3P
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}Wait a minute... One, two, thr— ...! Um, so anyway, uh... Some mission tonight, am I right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_COUPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, what're you staring at!? Focus on the mission![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_JYUNPEI_COUPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2028 0 0}Dude... If the Dark Hour ended right now... *gulp*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SANADA_COUPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3003 0 0}Just how many guests are there? We've gotta take care of business ASAP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_COUPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}*sigh* Try not to get distracted so easily...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_YUKARI_COUPLER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Stop gawking like that! C'mon, we still have to deal with the Shadow, you know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_CHECK1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Well, there's the mirror. So we just break it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_SANADA1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right, then. Time to end this hoax.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_JYUNPE1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then let's smash this thing to pieces on the count of three! One, two...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_FUKA1_T
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}The signal's close, but I'm not entirely certain that this is the right mirror...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Could you check the other room too, just in case?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_FUKA1_T
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}The signal's close, but I'm not entirely certain that this is the right mirror...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Could you check the other room too, just in case?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_FIRST_CHECK2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's a good point... Better to be safe than sorry, so let's cover all our bases first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, wait... There's something different about this one compared to the other one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You sure? It looks the same to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Huh, I don't see anything different about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}Now that I think about it, the mirror in the other room didn't show our reflections.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2094 0 0}What? They're messing with our reflections?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Are they pullin' some sorta magic trick on us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Well, these are Shadows we're dealing with... You might be onto something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}This mirror is reflecting everything but us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Holy crap, you're right! It's not showing me in all my heroic glory![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm, no, I don't think that's it, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Actually, now that you mention it, this heart looks a little more... hearty?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}What does that even mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3075 0 0}I can't tell if you're being serious or not, but I don't believe in ghosts myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Seriously? You're starting to sound like Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2113 0 0}Well, you know, these kinds of hotels are the perfect place for ghostly activities...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_JYUNPE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Cut it out, {f 4 1}-kun. We don't need you jumping on the doofus train, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, good, you noticed it too, so I'm not just going crazy. Yeah, that other mirror...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's definitely something up with a mirror that reflects everything except people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, looking back on it, I think it's the same thing as the mirror in the room the Shadow was in...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's definitely something up with a mirror that reflects everything except people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_FUKA21
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Wow! Yukari-chan, Leader, nice catch, you two![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I thought maybe I was just imagining things, but... I think the other mirror didn't show our reflections.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's definitely something up with a mirror that reflects everything except people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Here, look. This mirror isn't showing our reflections, see?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's definitely something up with a mirror that reflects everything except people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_FUKA22
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Oh, wow! Good eye, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The mirror in this room is probably just a normal mirror.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't we go check Room 205 again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MIRROR_SECOND_CHECK4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's definitely something up with a mirror that reflects everything except people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_3F_ErrorDoor_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5035 0 0}The mirror in that room wasn't the right one. Let's check a different room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_3F_ErrorDoor_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's focus on trying to find the right mirror for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HououLock_After
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}The Shadow should be in this room, right? We have to find it![n]{f 1 1}
